User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Bhartiya Swad platform, including both customers and administrators.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for login and communication.

displayName.description: The public display name or full name of the user.

role.description: The role of the user, determining access levels ('user' for customers, 'admin' for administrators).

totalOrders.description: The cumulative count of all orders placed by this user.

totalMoneySpent.description: The total monetary amount spent by this user.

address.description: The primary delivery address for the user.

Restaurant.title: Restaurant
Restaurant.description: Represents a restaurant partnered with the Bhartiya Swad platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Restaurant entity.

name.description: The official name of the restaurant.

address.description: The physical address of the restaurant.

phone.description: The contact phone number for the restaurant.

email.description: The contact email address for the restaurant.

imageURL.description: The URL to the main image or logo of the restaurant.

averageRating.description: The aggregated average rating of the restaurant.

totalOrders.description: The total number of orders received by this restaurant.

totalRevenue.description: The total revenue generated by this restaurant.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: Categorizes dishes for easier browsing and filtering.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

name.description: The name of the food category (e.g., 'Pizza', 'Biryani').

description.description: A brief description of the category.

Dish.title: Dish
Dish.description: Represents a single food item that can be ordered.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Dish entity.

description.description: A detailed description of the dish.

price.description: The current selling price of the dish.

image.description: URL to the image of the dish.

rating.description: The average user rating for this specific dish.

category.description: The category name this dish belongs to.

isVeg.description: Indicates if the dish is vegetarian.

restaurantId.description: Reference to the Restaurant that offers this dish.

totalOrders.description: The total count of times this dish has been ordered.

totalRevenue.description: The total revenue generated from the sales of this dish.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a complete order placed by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who placed this order.

restaurantId.description: Reference to the Restaurant from which this order was placed.

orderDate.description: The date and time when the order was placed.

totalAmount.description: The total monetary amount of the order.

status.description: The current processing status of the order.

deliveryAddress.description: The complete address specified for the delivery.

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents a single dish and its quantity within a larger order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

orderId.description: Reference to the Order this item is a part of.

dishId.description: Reference to the Dish item that was ordered.

foodName.description: Snapshot of the dish name at time of order.

unitPrice.description: Snapshot of the price at time of order.

definition.description: Determines admin privileges by document existence.
Stores details about all partner restaurants.
Stores items within a specific order.
